## Health Guardian Plus Individual

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Comprehensive medical expenses coverage
- Cashless hospitalization at 8,000+ network hospitals
- Pre-hospitalization expenses (30 days) and post-hospitalization (60 days)
- Ambulance charges and organ donor expenses
- Wellness benefits including annual health check-up

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹3 Lakhs to ₹10 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Lifetime renewability with guaranteed no claim bonus
- Restoration benefit (additional cover after depletion)
- Free health consultations (24/7 telemedicine)
- Day care treatments covered
- Mental health coverage included

**Eligibility:** Age 18-65 years | Individual coverage

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general illnesses), 90 days (specific conditions), Nil for accidents

**Exclusions:** Chronic pre-existing conditions (12 months), maternity benefits, cosmetic procedures, adventure sports

**Premium Range:** ₹8,000 - ₹15,000 per annum (varies by age and sum insured)

## Family Shield Floater

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Family floater plan covering up to 5 members
- Single sum insured applicable to entire family
- Cashless treatment at 9,500+ partner hospitals
- Domiciliary hospitalization for confined patients
- Emergency evacuation and repatriation services

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹25 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Affordable premium for entire family
- Children coverage from 91 days
- Parents and in-laws can be added
- Worldwide coverage (90 days per trip)
- Critical illness benefit rider available

**Eligibility:** Family members age 3-70 years | Maximum 5 members per family

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), 24 months (pre-existing conditions), Nil for accidents

**Exclusions:** Fertility treatments, experimental treatments, high-risk activities, occupational diseases

**Premium Range:** ₹12,000 - ₹35,000 per annum (based on family composition and sum insured)

## Senior Care Premium

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Specially designed for seniors aged 60+ years
- Comprehensive coverage including age-related ailments
- Simplified medical underwriting process
- Guaranteed availability regardless of health status
- Cashless hospitalization at 7,500+ senior-friendly hospitals

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹2 Lakhs to ₹10 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- No maximum claim limit per claim
- Free annual health screening
- Quarterly wellness check-ups
- Ayurvedic and Homeopathic treatment coverage
- No sub-limits on critical illnesses

**Eligibility:** Age 60-85 years | Individual or spouse coverage

**Waiting Period:** 90 days (illnesses), Nil (accidents), Extended for chronic conditions (24 months)

**Exclusions:** Non-medical treatments, cosmetic surgeries, self-inflicted injuries, certain pre-existing conditions

**Premium Range:** ₹18,000 - ₹45,000 per annum (depends on age and medical history)

## Maternity Secure Plan

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Dedicated coverage for pregnancy and childbirth
- Pre-natal and post-natal care expenses
- Normal and cesarean delivery expenses
- Newborn baby coverage from birth
- Neonatal intensive care coverage

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹2 Lakhs to ₹8 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Cashless maternity hospitalization
- Parenthood counseling sessions
- Pediatric consultation (12 months post-delivery)
- Congenital defects coverage for newborn
- No claim bonus transferable to general health cover

**Eligibility:** Married women age 18-45 years | Can be added as rider or standalone

**Waiting Period:** 9 months for maternity benefits, 24 months for congenital conditions

**Exclusions:** Complications from unsafe practices, terminations, STDs, delivery expenses before policy validity

**Premium Range:** ₹6,000 - ₹12,000 per annum (or ₹500-₹1,000 as rider)

## Critical Illness Guardian

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Standalone critical illness insurance
- Lump sum benefit on diagnosis of specified critical illnesses
- Covers 30+ critical conditions
- No hospitalization required for claim payout
- Can be combined with base health plan

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹10 Lakhs to ₹1 Crore

**Key Benefits:**
- Immediate cash benefit upon diagnosis
- Survival benefit (50% if survived 90 days)
- Return of premium on survival after policy term
- Re-coverage available after first claim
- Family income replacement benefit

**Eligibility:** Age 18-65 years | Individual or family coverage available

**Waiting Period:** 90 days from policy start date, Nil for accident-related critical illness

**Exclusions:** Pre-existing critical conditions, claims within 90 days (except accidents), self-inflicted injuries

**Premium Range:** ₹3,000 - ₹12,000 per annum (varies by age and sum insured)

## Super Top-Up Advantage

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Affordable top-up cover for existing health plans
- High deductible with low premium model
- Covers costs exceeding base policy limit
- Cashless coverage at extensive hospital network
- Can be attached to any base health insurance

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹25 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Exceptional value for money
- No claim bonus on top-up cover
- Enhanced sum insured restoration available
- Worldwide coverage during travel
- Family members coverage from age 91 days

**Eligibility:** Must have active base health policy | Age 18-70 years | Individual or family floater

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general illnesses), Nil (accidents), 24 months (pre-existing)

**Exclusions:** Claims within deductible amount, occupational injuries, non-allopathic treatments, adventure sports

**Premium Range:** ₹2,500 - ₹8,000 per annum (highly affordable)

## Comprehensive Corporate Care

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Tailored group health insurance for corporates
- Employee and dependent coverage
- Portability for key employees
- Occupational injury and disease coverage
- Customizable sum insured options

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹3 Lakhs to ₹50 Lakhs per employee

**Key Benefits:**
- Competitive group premiums with volume discounts
- Dedicated claim management team
- Employee wellness programs and fitness benefits
- Maternity and paternity benefits included
- Executive health check-up camps

**Eligibility:** Corporates with minimum 10 employees | Employees age 18-65 years | Spouses and children up to age 25

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (illnesses), 24 months (pre-existing conditions), Nil (accidents)

**Exclusions:** Non-occupational injuries in certain cases, cosmetic treatments, intentional self-harm, experimental procedures

**Premium Range:** ₹8,000 - ₹20,000 per employee per annum (varies by group size and benefits)

## Health Restoration Plus

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Plan emphasizing high restoration benefit
- Automatic restoration after claim settlement
- Unlimited restoration cycles per policy year
- Comprehensive hospitalization coverage
- Day care and surgical procedures covered

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹20 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Enhanced no-claim bonus (up to 50%)
- Automatic restoration without waiting period
- Accidental hospitalization covered fully
- Preventive health screenings included
- Worldwide emergency coverage (180 days)

**Eligibility:** Age 18-70 years | Individual and family floater options | Maximum 6 family members

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (illnesses), Nil (accidents), 90 days (specific conditions)

**Exclusions:** Pre-existing conditions (12 months), occupational diseases in certain circumstances, high-risk sports

**Premium Range:** ₹10,000 - ₹30,000 per annum (depends on age group and family size)

## Wellness Elite Individual

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Focus on preventive healthcare and wellness
- Annual comprehensive health check-up package
- Fitness program membership benefits
- Nutrition and lifestyle counseling
- Cashless hospitalization at premium network

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹3 Lakhs to ₹10 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Free annual health screening (full body check-up)
- Gym and yoga class membership reimbursement
- Preventive medicine consultation (free quarterly)
- Mental health and stress management programs
- Digital health records and mobile app access

**Eligibility:** Age 25-65 years | Individual coverage | Non-smokers get premium discount

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general illnesses), Nil (accidents), 60 days (specific procedures)

**Exclusions:** Cosmetic procedures, fertility treatments, alternative medicine (except Ayurveda), adventure sports

**Premium Range:** ₹7,500 - ₹18,000 per annum (wellness benefits justify premium)

## Young Professional Plus

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Designed for working professionals age 25-40
- Affordable premiums with comprehensive coverage
- Occupational injury and disease covered
- Professional wellness benefits included
- Digital-first claims process

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹15 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Paperless and hassle-free claims settlement
- Mobile app for claim tracking and reimbursement
- 24/7 customer support and health advisory
- Mental health consultation (quarterly free sessions)
- Work-from-home hospitalization support

**Eligibility:** Age 25-40 years | Salaried professionals and self-employed | Individual or family

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (illnesses), Nil (accidents), 90 days (specified exclusions)

**Exclusions:** Sports-related injuries (unless covered under rider), cosmetic treatments, maternity without rider

**Premium Range:** ₹6,500 - ₹16,000 per annum (competitive for age group)

## Ayurveda Integrated Health

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Unique blend of modern and traditional medicine
- Coverage for Ayurvedic, Unani, and Homeopathic treatments
- Allopathic hospitalization fully covered
- In-patient and out-patient traditional medicine
- Wellness retreat packages included

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹3 Lakhs to ₹10 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Ayurvedic treatment hospitalization (₹50,000-₹2 Lakhs)
- Panchakarma therapy partially covered
- Annual wellness and detox retreat (₹50,000 value)
- Preventive health programs and consultations
- No claim bonus on modern medicine benefits

**Eligibility:** Age 18-70 years | Individual and family floater | Traditional medicine enthusiasts

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (modern medicine), 60 days (traditional treatments), Nil (accidents)

**Exclusions:** Unproven traditional therapies, cosmetic treatments, long-term wellness retreats

**Premium Range:** ₹8,500 - ₹20,000 per annum (includes wellness retreat value)

## Student Health Secure

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Specifically designed for students and young adults
- Affordable premium structure for limited income
- Coverage across metropolitan and tier-2 cities
- Cashless treatment at 6,000+ hospitals
- Parent co-applicant option available

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹2 Lakhs to ₹5 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Day care procedures fully covered
- Vaccination and immunization covered
- Dental treatment (₹20,000 annually)
- Sports injury coverage included
- Free annual health screening

**Eligibility:** Age 18-25 years | Students and fresh graduates | Individual coverage

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (illnesses), Nil (accidents), 60 days (specific procedures)

**Exclusions:** Occupational injuries, cosmetic procedures, self-inflicted injuries, high-risk activities

**Premium Range:** ₹2,500 - ₹5,500 per annum (budget-friendly option)

## Family Floater Premium

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Premium family floater with highest benefits
- Coverage for up to 6 family members
- Multi-generational protection (grandparents to grandchildren)
- Enhanced network access (10,000+ hospitals)
- Comprehensive emergency and critical care

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹10 Lakhs to ₹1 Crore

**Key Benefits:**
- Best-in-class claim settlement ratio (99%+)
- Family critical illness rider available
- Maternity and newborn care included
- Annual health check-up camp (entire family)
- Global emergency assistance 24/7

**Eligibility:** Family members age 3-80 years | Maximum 6 members | Single sum insured for all

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general illnesses), 90 days (specific), Nil (accidents), 24 months (pre-existing)

**Exclusions:** High-risk activities, experimental treatments, non-medical treatments, occupational hazards

**Premium Range:** ₹25,000 - ₹60,000 per annum (premium for extensive family coverage)

## Partner Care Health Plan

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Designed for business partners and entrepreneurs
- Key person insurance with business continuity benefits
- Employee and family coverage included
- High sum insured for critical illness
- Customizable coverage options

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹75 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Priority claim settlement (48-72 hours)
- Business interruption coverage rider available
- Emergency loans against health insurance
- Post-hospitalization rehabilitation covered
- Worldwide coverage including Asia-Pacific region

**Eligibility:** Entrepreneurs and business partners age 25-60 years | Partnership firms and LLPs

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (illnesses), Nil (accidents), 12 months (pre-existing conditions)

**Exclusions:** Occupational hazards (unless covered), substance abuse related treatments, intentional injuries

**Premium Range:** ₹15,000 - ₹50,000 per annum (based on sum insured and business profile)

## Accident and Emergency Cover

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Specialized accident and emergency insurance
- Immediate coverage for accidental injuries
- Emergency evacuation and air ambulance covered
- Trauma care and surgical procedures included
- 24/7 emergency response team

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹20 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Cashless emergency treatment authorization
- Daily cash benefit during hospitalization (₹500-₹2,000)
- Temporary disability allowance (3-12 months)
- Accidental death benefit for family
- No waiting period for accident claims

**Eligibility:** Age 18-70 years | Individual or family coverage | Active professionals and adventurers

**Waiting Period:** Nil for accidental injuries and emergencies | 30 days (specified illnesses)

**Exclusions:** Intentional injuries, substance abuse related, suicide within 12 months, criminal activities

**Premium Range:** ₹3,500 - ₹10,000 per annum (specialized coverage)

## Comprehensive Lifetime Coverage

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Lifetime coverage with no age limit
- Portability across insurance companies
- Continuity of benefits after retirement
- Guaranteed renewability till age 100
- Lifelong accumulation of no-claim bonus

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹30 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Cumulative no-claim bonus up to 100%
- Loyalty rewards (complimentary upgrades)
- Transfer existing no-claim bonus
- Free annual health screening
- Priority customer service for long-term members

**Eligibility:** Any age starting from 18 years | Individual and family options | No upper age limit for renewals

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (illnesses), Nil (accidents), Carried over from previous policy for pre-existing

**Exclusions:** Excluded conditions (as per policy document), non-allopathic treatments, self-inflicted injuries

**Premium Range:** ₹12,000 - ₹40,000 per annum (increases with age but benefits accumulate)

## Rural and Semi-Urban Health Plan

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Extended network in rural and semi-urban areas
- 4,000+ empanelled hospitals across tier-2 and tier-3 cities
- Simplified enrollment process for rural customers
- Multi-lingual support and assistance
- Affordability focus with reasonable premiums

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹1 Lakh to ₹5 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Cashless hospitalization in nearby towns
- Reimbursement for treatment in metropolitan centers
- Maternity and newborn benefits included
- Free annual health check-up camps
- Digital support through mobile app (Hindi/regional language)

**Eligibility:** Age 18-70 years | Residents of rural and semi-urban areas | Individual and family

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general illnesses), Nil (accidents), Extended for pre-existing (24 months)

**Exclusions:** High-end cosmetic procedures, experimental treatments, occupational diseases

**Premium Range:** ₹3,000 - ₹8,000 per annum (budget-friendly for rural customers)

## Women's Wellness Specialist

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Comprehensive plan focusing on women's health
- Coverage for gynecological and reproductive health
- Maternity, miscarriage, and post-partum care
- Breast cancer and cervical cancer screening
- Preventive health and wellness programs

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹2 Lakhs to ₹10 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Annual gynecological screening (free)
- Maternity benefit without specific waiting period (for new policies)
- Cosmetic procedures coverage (₹50,000 annually)
- Mental health and stress management counseling
- Partner consultation and family planning advice

**Eligibility:** Women age 18-55 years | Individual or family coverage | Marital status independent

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general illnesses), 9 months (maternity), Nil (accidents)

**Exclusions:** Fertility enhancement treatments, complications from unsafe practices, self-inflicted injuries

**Premium Range:** ₹8,000 - ₹20,000 per annum (specialized women's health focus)

## Budget Care Essential

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Entry-level health insurance with core benefits
- Affordable premium for basic health security
- Coverage at 5,000+ network hospitals
- Essential hospitalization and day care
- No frills, straightforward claim process

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹1 Lakh to ₹3 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Cashless hospitalization for accidents and emergencies
- Free annual health check-up (basic package)
- Day care procedures included
- No claim bonus (non-cumulative)
- Simple and transparent policy terms

**Eligibility:** Age 18-60 years | Individual or couple plan | First-time insurance buyers

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (illnesses), Nil (accidents), 60 days (specific conditions)

**Exclusions:** Pre-existing conditions (12 months), occupational injuries, cosmetic treatments, maternity without rider

**Premium Range:** ₹1,500 - ₹4,000 per annum (budget-friendly entry option)

## Health Guardian Individual Plus

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Comprehensive hospitalization coverage for all illnesses and injuries
- Cashless treatment at 5,000+ empanelled hospitals nationwide
- Day-care procedures covered (no hospitalization required)
- Ambulance costs up to ₹2,000 per claim
- Outpatient consultation reimbursement

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹25 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- 100% claim reimbursement after deductible
- No-claim bonus up to 50% cumulative
- Automatic policy restoration on first claim
- Accidental death benefit (₹5 Lakhs)
- 24/7 claim support and hospitalization assistance

**Eligibility:** Age 18-65 years

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), 90 days (specific illnesses)

**Exclusions:** Pre-existing conditions (36 months), cosmetic surgery, alcohol/drug-related treatment

**Premium Range:** ₹8,000 - ₹18,000 annually based on age and sum insured

## Family Shield Floater Gold

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Single sum insured applicable to entire family
- Covers parents, spouse, children, and dependent grandparents
- Cashless hospitalization at 4,500+ network hospitals
- Day-care surgery coverage (chemotherapy, dialysis, cataract)
- Maternity coverage after 12-month waiting period

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹10 Lakhs to ₹50 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Shared family floater pool for maximum flexibility
- Annual health check-up (₹15,000 coverage)
- No-claim bonus (20% per claim-free year)
- Restoration cover (₹5 Lakhs additional)
- Newborn baby coverage from birth

**Eligibility:** Family members aged 3-70 years

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), 365 days (maternity)

**Exclusions:** Cosmetic treatments, IVF, mental health treatments (except emergency), routine check-ups

**Premium Range:** ₹15,000 - ₹40,000 annually for family of 4

## Senior Secure Supreme

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Specially designed for seniors aged 60+ years
- Comprehensive coverage for age-related ailments
- Cashless treatment across 3,500+ senior-friendly hospitals
- Pre-existing conditions covered after 24-month waiting period
- Accidental injury coverage with no age limit

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹20 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Enhanced ambulance coverage (₹5,000 per claim)
- Annual health check-up with preferred diagnostic center
- Critical illness benefit (₹2-5 Lakhs additional)
- 24/7 senior care assistance hotline
- Quarterly health newsletters and wellness tips

**Eligibility:** Age 60-80 years, spouse can be younger

**Waiting Period:** 24 months for pre-existing conditions, 90 days for general

**Exclusions:** Pregnancy (spouse), experimental treatments, routine dental care, hearing aids

**Premium Range:** ₹12,000 - ₹35,000 annually based on age and sum insured

## Critical Care Shield Elite

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Standalone critical illness coverage for 40+ defined diseases
- Lump sum payment on diagnosis of covered critical illness
- Covers cancer, heart attack, stroke, kidney failure, organ transplant
- No waiting period for accidental critical illnesses
- Worldwide coverage up to 90 days per episode

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹10 Lakhs to ₹1 Crore

**Key Benefits:**
- Immediate lump sum payment (100% on diagnosis)
- Survival benefit clause (30-day survival required)
- Can be combined with base health policy
- Accidental hospitalization benefit (₹2 Lakhs)
- Free health screening annually

**Eligibility:** Age 18-65 years at inception

**Waiting Period:** 90 days for most illnesses, none for accidental

**Exclusions:** Pre-existing critical conditions, high-risk occupations, substance abuse

**Premium Range:** ₹5,000 - ₹25,000 annually based on sum insured

## Top-Up Advantage Booster

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Affordable top-up coverage for existing health insurance
- Activates only after base policy limit exhaustion
- Additional coverage without duplicating benefits
- Comprehensive deductible options (₹50K to ₹2 Lakhs)
- Seamless cashless coordination with primary insurance

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹50 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- No medical underwriting (if base policy exists)
- Automatic policy renewal with bonus continuation
- Coverage for critical care and specialized treatments
- Ambulance and pre-hospitalization included
- Family floater option available

**Eligibility:** Must have existing health insurance, age 18-65 years

**Waiting Period:** 15 days (general), no waiting for accidental

**Exclusions:** Conditions already claimed under base policy, cosmetic procedures, sports injuries

**Premium Range:** ₹3,000 - ₹12,000 annually depending on deductible and sum insured

## Maternity Marvel Complete

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Comprehensive maternity and newborn coverage
- Pre-natal and post-natal expenses (up to 3 months)
- Normal and cesarean delivery costs fully covered
- Newborn baby coverage for 90 days
- Neonatal ICU coverage included

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹3 Lakhs to ₹15 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Covers multiple pregnancies (up to 2 during policy period)
- Infertility treatment coverage (IVF, IUI) after 12 months
- Lactation counseling and nutritional support
- 24/7 maternal health hotline with expert doctors
- Cashless at 2,000+ mother-and-child specialty centers

**Eligibility:** Age 18-45 years, valid marriage certificate

**Waiting Period:** 12 months for maternity benefits

**Exclusions:** Abortion (except medical necessity), beauty treatments, termination complications excluded

**Premium Range:** ₹8,000 - ₹18,000 annually for individual, ₹12,000 - ₹25,000 for couples

## Corporate Wellness Pro

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Customized group health plan for corporates (minimum 50 employees)
- Flexible sum insured levels and family coverage options
- Cashless treatment at 6,000+ network hospitals
- Workplace wellness program integration
- Annual occupational health screening

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹10 Lakhs to ₹75 Lakhs per employee

**Key Benefits:**
- Portability option for employees leaving company
- Mental health counseling (50 sessions/year)
- Preventive care and wellness module
- Spouse and children coverage options
- 24/7 employee assistance program

**Eligibility:** Employees aged 18-65 years in registered company

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), 90 days (specific)

**Exclusions:** Pre-existing conditions, psychiatric treatments (except emergency), cosmetic procedures

**Premium Range:** ₹8,000 - ₹20,000 per employee annually (group rates negotiable)

## Optima Restore Comprehensive

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Mid-range individual comprehensive coverage
- Full-service cashless treatment network
- Automatic restoration benefit (₹5 Lakhs) on first claim
- Day-care and outpatient benefits included
- Pre-hospitalization (7 days) and post-hospitalization (30 days) covered

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹7 Lakhs to ₹30 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Restoration cover included (no additional premium)
- Organ donation benefit (₹10 Lakhs)
- Occupational disease coverage
- Health coaching and wellness apps
- Emergency assistance worldwide

**Eligibility:** Age 18-60 years

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), 120 days (specific illnesses)

**Exclusions:** Adventure sports injuries, self-inflicted injuries, mental health treatments

**Premium Range:** ₹10,000 - ₹22,000 annually based on age and coverage

## Health Companion Silver

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Basic yet comprehensive health insurance plan
- Ideal for budget-conscious individuals
- Cashless at network hospitals across metro and tier-2 cities
- Day-care surgery and emergency treatments covered
- Simple claims process with 24/7 support

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹3 Lakhs to ₹12 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- No-claim bonus up to 30%
- Accidental hospitalization waiver of deductible
- Medicine and diagnostics coverage (₹25,000/year)
- Free annual health check-up
- Quick claim settlement (48 hours)

**Eligibility:** Age 18-70 years

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), 90 days (specific conditions)

**Exclusions:** Cosmetic surgery, experimental treatments, sports injuries, routine dental work

**Premium Range:** ₹4,000 - ₹9,000 annually (highly affordable entry-level option)

## Super Top-Up Family

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Family top-up plan covering entire household members
- Higher deductible means lower premium
- Activation only after base policy exhaustion
- Joint floater family benefit pool
- Covers up to 6 family members

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹10 Lakhs to ₹1 Crore

**Key Benefits:**
- Flexible deductible selection (₹1-2 Lakhs)
- No medical underwriting if base policy active
- Family coverage for parents, spouse, children
- Automatic annual bonus (₹1 Lakh increase per claim-free year)
- Simplified claim documentation

**Eligibility:** Any age group with active base health insurance

**Waiting Period:** 15 days (general), none for accidental

**Exclusions:** Claims within deductible, pre-existing exclusions from base policy

**Premium Range:** ₹5,000 - ₹15,000 annually for family (varies by deductible chosen)

## Diamond Health Lifetime

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Premium lifetime health insurance with highest benefits
- Unlimited restorability and no sum insured capping
- Worldwide coverage including emergency evacuation
- Concierge medical services and specialist consultations
- Comprehensive diagnostic and treatment coverage

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹25 Lakhs to ₹1 Crore (unlimited renewal options)

**Key Benefits:**
- Unlimited restoration benefit (no cap per year)
- Priority hospitalization at premium centers
- Global health coverage with local support
- Annual preventive care worth ₹50,000
- Lifetime policy continuation guarantee

**Eligibility:** Age 18-65 years, income verification required

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), none for accidental injuries

**Exclusions:** Illegal activities, self-harm, high-risk occupations, adventure sports

**Premium Range:** ₹25,000 - ₹60,000+ annually based on sum insured and coverage scope

## Health Saver Economy

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Most affordable entry-level health insurance plan
- Essential hospitalization coverage for common ailments
- Cashless at 2,000+ partner hospitals
- Planned hospitalization and emergencies both covered
- Ideal for young, healthy individuals and students

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹2 Lakhs to ₹5 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Minimal documentation requirement
- Free annual medical check-up
- No co-payment for cashless claims
- Daily hospital allowance (₹500-1,000)
- Accidental death benefit (₹2 Lakhs)

**Eligibility:** Age 18-45 years

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), 6 months (specific illnesses)

**Exclusions:** Pre-existing conditions (first 12 months), maternity, experimental treatments

**Premium Range:** ₹2,500 - ₹6,000 annually (ultra-budget friendly)

## Executive Care Plus

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Tailored for senior professionals and executives
- Premium hospitalization at super-specialty centers
- Enhanced coverage for lifestyle diseases
- Personal health manager and wellness coaching
- Comprehensive health risk assessment

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹20 Lakhs to ₹75 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Dedicated claims manager for personalized service
- Pre-hospitalization consultation with specialists
- Post-discharge rehabilitation covered (₹2 Lakhs)
- Mental wellness program with counseling
- Priority appointments at network hospitals

**Eligibility:** Age 30-70 years, minimum annual income ₹15 Lakhs

**Waiting Period:** 30 days (general), 60 days (specific)

**Exclusions:** Self-inflicted injuries, adventure sports, alternative medicine

**Premium Range:** ₹20,000 - ₹50,000 annually based on profile and sum insured

## Chronic Care Companion

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Specialized plan for chronic disease management
- Covers diabetes, hypertension, asthma, thyroid conditions
- Regular medication and outpatient treatment included
- Hospitalization for disease-related complications
- Regular monitoring and preventive care

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹5 Lakhs to ₹20 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Monthly medication allowance (₹2,000-5,000)
- Regular health check-up (quarterly/biannual)
- Specialist consultation coverage
- Hospitalization with zero deductible for complications
- Dietary counseling and wellness support

**Eligibility:** Age 18-70 years with documented chronic condition

**Waiting Period:** 30 days from policy inception

**Exclusions:** Non-compliance with treatment, experimental therapies, cosmetic treatments

**Premium Range:** ₹10,000 - ₹25,000 annually based on condition severity

## Weekend Warrior Sports

**Coverage Highlights:**
- Specialized coverage for sports enthusiasts and athletes
- Sports injury coverage and rehabilitation
- Emergency medical evacuation (adventure activities)
- Physiotherapy and recovery center treatments
- Accident hospitalization with extended benefits

**Sum Insured Range:** ₹8 Lakhs to ₹25 Lakhs

**Key Benefits:**
- Sports injury coverage (excluding professional athletes)
- Physiotherapy benefit (₹50,000/year)
